name: claude-for-financial-services
description: Financial analysis, research, and operations plugins for Claude

plugins.name: financial-analysis
plugins.description: Core financial analysis: statement review, ratio analysis, forecasting, and modeling

plugins.name: pitch-agent
plugins.description: Investment pitch evaluation, deal scoring, and presentation analysis

plugins.name: gl-reconciler
plugins.description: General ledger reconciliation, variance analysis, and journal entry automation

plugins.name: market-researcher
plugins.description: Market trends, competitive intelligence, and industry research automation

plugins.name: month-end-closer
plugins.description: Month-end closing workflows, checklists, accruals, and consolidation automation

plugins.name: investment-banking
plugins.description: M&A advisory, IPO preparation, LBO modeling, and capital structure analysis

plugins.name: equity-research
plugins.description: Equity valuation, DCF analysis, comp tables, and research report generation
